summary: Iteration 13 testing complete. All 44 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass. BG locale shows 4 updated benefit phrases. EN/RO locales render without errors. context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 focused on: (1) BG translation fixes in landing page benefits section - all 4 phrases updated correctly, (2) Cyrillic city transliteration via curated _CITY_OVERRIDES dict + static ISO-9 fallback - tested Sofia, Plovdiv, Varna, Burgas, Ruse, Veliko Tarnovo, Hisarya, (3) Country auto-fill from host TLD (.bg→Bulgaria, .ro→Romania, .com→Bulgaria), (4) SellPage city input no longer has Latin-only restriction (no pattern attribute, no regex validation, placeholder shows both scripts), (5) Image dedup logic for mobile.bg URLs - _canon strips size folders/suffixes, _score prioritizes big variants. All tests pass.
